'''竏嗅-dh-y-b''' ('''kakadhyeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberize|tuberize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberize|tuberize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗅-dh-y-b
|-
! Lemma
| kakadhyeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadhyeboko|thikadhyeboko]] || [[word:jikadhyeboko|jikadhyeboko]] || [[word:shikadhyeboko|shikadhyeboko]] || [[word:kikadhyeboko|kikadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadhyeboko|thuthukadhyeboko]] || [[word:jujukadhyeboko|jujukadhyeboko]] || [[word:shushukadhyeboko|shushukadhyeboko]] || [[word:kukukadhyeboko|kukukadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukadhyeboko|thukadhyeboko]] || [[word:jukadhyeboko|jukadhyeboko]] || [[word:shukadhyeboko|shukadhyeboko]] || [[word:kukadhyeboko|kukadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadhyeboko|thukadhyeboko]] || [[word:jukadhyeboko|jukadhyeboko]] || [[word:shukadhyeboko|shukadhyeboko]] || [[word:kukadhyeboko|kukadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadhyeboko|thekadhyeboko]] || [[word:jekadhyeboko|jekadhyeboko]] || [[word:shekadhyeboko|shekadhyeboko]] || [[word:kekadhyeboko|kekadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadhyeboko|thothokadhyeboko]] || [[word:jojokadhyeboko|jojokadhyeboko]] || [[word:shoshokadhyeboko|shoshokadhyeboko]] || [[word:kokokadhyeboko|kokokadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadhyeboko|thokadhyeboko]] || [[word:jokadhyeboko|jokadhyeboko]] || [[word:shokadhyeboko|shokadhyeboko]] || [[word:kokadhyeboko|kokadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadhyeboko|thokadhyeboko]] || [[word:jokadhyeboko|jokadhyeboko]] || [[word:shokadhyeboko|shokadhyeboko]] || [[word:kokadhyeboko|kokadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦkadhyeboko|thﾃｦkadhyeboko]] || [[word:jﾃｦkadhyeboko|jﾃｦkadhyeboko]] || [[word:shﾃｦkadhyeboko|shﾃｦkadhyeboko]] || [[word:kﾃｦkadhyeboko|kﾃｦkadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadhyeboko|thathakadhyeboko]] || [[word:jajakadhyeboko|jajakadhyeboko]] || [[word:shashakadhyeboko|shashakadhyeboko]] || [[word:kakakadhyeboko|kakakadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadhyeboko|thakadhyeboko]] || [[word:jakadhyeboko|jakadhyeboko]] || [[word:shakadhyeboko|shakadhyeboko]] || [[word:kakadhyeboko|kakadhyeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadhyeboko|thakadhyeboko]] || [[word:jakadhyeboko|jakadhyeboko]] || [[word:shakadhyeboko|shakadhyeboko]] || [[word:kakadhyeboko|kakadhyeboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
